title: Retrospective Record
description: Record of a sprint, phase, or lifecycle retrospective, capturing what went well, improvement areas, actions, and AI/ML experiment learnings.

scope.description: Scope of the retrospective: sprint-level, phase-level, or full lifecycle

phase.description: Lifecycle phase to which this retrospective applies

sprint_id.description: Sprint identifier if this is a sprint retrospective

facilitator.description: Person or role who facilitated the retrospective

participants.description: List of participants in the retrospective

what_went_well.description: Things that went well and should be continued or celebrated

owner.description: Person or role responsible for this action

ai_experiment_learnings.description: Specific learnings from AI/ML experiments run during this sprint or phase

team_health_summary.description: Brief summary of team health observations from this retrospective
